offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inadequate monitoring of compliance documentation causes project delays. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking of compliance documents.
problem: Inadequate monitoring of contractor compliance documentation leads to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try alert system for missing documents and dashboard for compliance status overview on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
